category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held or transportable power tools exported from China to Ethiopia, covering electrical safety, EMC, market conformity, noise, restricted substances, and battery requirements.

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入埃塞俄比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入衣索比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Ethiopian requirements: ES adoption of IEC 62841, ESA national conformity, CACEA import inspection, ECA radio approval for cordless tools, electrical safety, EMC, and battery considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与埃塞俄比亚要求差距对照：ES 采用 IEC 62841、ESA 国家符合性、CACEA 进口检验、无绳工具的 ECA 无线电批准、电气安全、电磁兼容及电池考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與衣索比亞要求差距對照：ES 採用 IEC 62841、ESA 國家符合性、CACEA 進口檢驗、無繩工具的 ECA 無線電批准、電氣安全、電磁相容及電池考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Ethiopian standards, ESA and CACEA conformity and import-inspection practice, ECA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行埃塞俄比亚标准、ESA 与 CACEA 的符合性与进口检验实践、ECA 无线电规则及目的国执法情况。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行衣索比亞標準、ESA 與 CACEA 的符合性與進口檢驗實務、ECA 無線電規則及目的國執法情況。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Ethiopia, the baseline is conformity with Ethiopian standards (ES), which commonly adopt IEC 62841, verified through ESA national conformity and CACEA / Ministry of Trade import inspection at entry via Djibouti; cordless tools with radio functions also need ECA radio approval. There is no EU-style mandatory outdoor-noise product marking in Ethiopia, so noise should be treated as a design and labour-safety consideration, not a product CE-equivalent marking obligation.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入埃塞俄比亚，基线是符合埃塞俄比亚标准（ES，通常采用 IEC 62841），并通过 ESA 国家符合性以及 CACEA／贸易部在经吉布提入境时的进口检验加以验证；具备无线电功能的无绳工具还需 ECA 无线电批准。埃塞俄比亚没有欧盟式的强制户外噪声产品标识，因此噪声应作为设计和劳动安全考量，而非等同 CE 的产品标识义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入衣索比亞，基線是符合衣索比亞標準（ES，通常採用 IEC 62841），並透過 ESA 國家符合性以及 CACEA／貿易部在經吉布提入境時的進口檢驗加以驗證；具備無線電功能的無繩工具還需 ECA 無線電批准。衣索比亞沒有歐盟式的強制戶外噪聲產品標識，因此噪聲應作為設計和勞動安全考量，而非等同 CE 的產品標識義務。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or on regulatory change, whichever is sooner
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
